title: Wyoming celebrates 'nuclear renaissance' as feds approve license for a new reactor
description: Construction of an advanced nuclear power plant partly funded by the U.S. government -billed as the first of its kind this century, is now underway in Wyoming. The Bill Gates-backed company says its technology is proven but there are still hurdles to nuclear.

description: Ben Rice took another step Friday in proving his value in the big leagues.  At the start of the season, the Yankees were hesitant to use him against left-handed pitchers, often leaving the catcher-turned-first baseman out of the lineup.  However, he continued to make his case to the Yankees that he can be matched up...
